name: Microsoft Outlook Mail Profiles
categoryDescription: Application-specific artifacts — Office document activity, Outlook profiles, media player history, and communication tools.
description: Outlook MAPI profile configuration — mail server settings, PST/OST file paths, and account configuration for each mail profile.
forensic_value: PST/OST file paths reveal where email stores are located — relevant for email exfiltration investigation. Multiple profiles may indicate multiple email accounts. Server settings reveal mail infrastructure in use.
